languages.text: Спуск был долгим и изматывающим. Многие бойцы не выдержали встречи с ледяным сумраком недр мира-гробницы. Невыносимый холод, которым дышали сами стены, выпил их досуха — обессиленные, они разжимали пальцы и падали вниз. Тьма и забвение поглотили их тела.

traits.locale_text: Спуск был долгим и выматывающим. Иссушенная жарким дыханием Музеона кожа лопалась на лицах бойцов, окровавленными пальцами цепляющихся за почти невидимые выступы на отвесных стенах колодца. Исполненный мучений путь едва близился к середине, когда откуда-то снизу поднялось почти невесомое облако удушливого газа. Он за считанные мгновения унес жизни всех, кто пренебрег дыхательными масками. Их тела, безжизненно повисшие на страховочных тросах, едва не увлекли за собой в бездну и остальных.

languages.text: The descent was long and arduous. Many of the soldiers succumbed to the icy darkness they faced in the bowels of this Tomb World. The unbearable cold, emanating from the very walls of the place, sapped them; their strength spent, they unclenched their fingers and plummeted. Dark oblivion claimed their bodies forever.
languages.original_text: Спуск был долгим и изматывающим. Многие бойцы не выдержали встречи с ледяным сумраком недр мира-гробницы. Невыносимый холод, которым дышали сами стены, выпил их досуха — обессиленные, они разжимали пальцы и падали вниз. Тьма и забвение поглотили их тела.

traits.locale_text: The descent was long and arduous. Many among the soldiers succumbed to the icy darkness they faced in the bowels of this tomb world. The unbearable cold, emanating like a breath from the very walls of the place, drank them dry; their strength spent, they unclenched their fingers and plummet. Dark oblivion claimed their bodies forever.

The descent was long and arduous. Many of the soldiers succumbed to the icy darkness they faced in the bowels of this tomb world. The unbearable cold, emanating from the very walls of the place, sapped them; their strength spent, they unclenched their fingers and plummeted. Dark oblivion claimed their bodies forever.

The descent was long and arduous. The squad's skin dried out and split under the hot exhalations of the xenotech, and the poisonous miasmas made the fighters unclench their fingers and plummet, lifeless, into the chasm below.

The descent was long and arduous. Many among the soldiers succumbed to the icy darkness they faced in the bowels of this tomb world. The unbearable cold, emanating like a breath from the very walls of the place, drank them dry; their strength spent, they unclenched their fingers and plummet. Dark oblivion claimed their bodies forever.

The descent was long and arduous. Many of the soldiers succumbed to the icy darkness they faced in the bowels of this tomb world. The unbearable cold, emanating from the very walls of the place, sapped them; their strength spent, they unclenched their fingers and plummeted. Dark oblivion claimed their bodies forever.

languages.text: 下行之路漫长而艰难。许多士兵没能扛住墓穴世界深处的冰冷黑暗。无处不在的刺骨寒气从墙壁中渗出，一点点抽干了他们的力气。体力耗尽，手指一松，人便坠入深渊。虚无的黑暗永远吞没了他们。
languages.original_text: The descent was long and arduous. Many of the soldiers succumbed to the icy darkness they faced in the bowels of this Tomb World. The unbearable cold, emanating from the very walls of the place, sapped them; their strength spent, they unclenched their fingers and plummeted. Dark oblivion claimed their bodies forever.

traits.locale_text: 下行之路漫长而艰难。许多士兵没能扛住墓穴世界深处的冰冷黑暗。无处不在的刺骨寒气从墙壁中渗出，一点点抽干了他们的力气。体力耗尽，手指一松，人便坠入深渊。虚无的黑暗永远吞没了他们。

languages.text: El descenso fue largo y complejo. Muchos de los soldados sucumbieron a la gélida oscuridad de las entrañas de este mundo necrópolis. El insoportable frío que emanaba de las paredes socavaba sus fuerzas y, cuando no podían más, aflojaban los dedos y se precipitaban. La oscuridad se adueñaba eternamente de sus cuerpos.
languages.original_text: The descent was long and arduous. Many of the soldiers succumbed to the icy darkness they faced in the bowels of this Tomb World. The unbearable cold, emanating from the very walls of the place, sapped them; their strength spent, they unclenched their fingers and plummeted. Dark oblivion claimed their bodies forever.

traits.locale_text: El descenso fue largo y complejo. Muchos de los soldados sucumbieron a la gélida oscuridad de las entrañas de este mundo necrópolis. El insoportable frío que emanaba de las paredes socavaba sus fuerzas y, cuando no podían más, aflojaban los dedos y se precipitaban. La oscuridad se adueñaba eternamente de sus cuerpos.

languages.text: La descente était longue et éreintante. Nombreux furent les soldats à succomber dans l'obscurité glaciale des entrailles de ce monde-nécropole. Le froid insupportable qui semblait émaner des murs mêmes de l'endroit les vidait de toute énergie, épuisant leurs forces jusqu'à les obliger à lâcher prise. Les ténèbres les engloutirent à jamais.
languages.original_text: The descent was long and arduous. Many of the soldiers succumbed to the icy darkness they faced in the bowels of this Tomb World. The unbearable cold, emanating from the very walls of the place, sapped them; their strength spent, they unclenched their fingers and plummeted. Dark oblivion claimed their bodies forever.

traits.locale_text: La descente était longue et éreintante. Nombreux furent les soldats à succomber dans l'obscurité glaciale des entrailles de ce monde-nécropole. Le froid insupportable qui semblait émaner des murs mêmes de l'endroit les vidait de toute énergie, épuisant leurs forces jusqu'à les obliger à lâcher prise. Les ténèbres les engloutirent à jamais.

languages.text: İniş uzun ve çetindi. Askerlerin çoğu, bu mezar dünyanın derinliklerinde karşılaştıkları o buzlu karanlığa yenik düştü. Mekânın bizzat duvarlarından yayılan dayanılmaz soğuk onları tüketiyordu. Güçleri tükenen askerler, parmaklarını gevşetip aşağıya çakıldı. Bedenleri sonsuza dek o karanlık hiçliğe gömüldü.
languages.original_text: The descent was long and arduous. Many of the soldiers succumbed to the icy darkness they faced in the bowels of this Tomb World. The unbearable cold, emanating from the very walls of the place, sapped them; their strength spent, they unclenched their fingers and plummeted. Dark oblivion claimed their bodies forever.

traits.locale_text: İniş uzun ve çetindi. Askerlerin çoğu, bu mezar dünyanın derinliklerinde karşılaştıkları o buzlu karanlığa yenik düştü. Mekânın bizzat duvarlarından yayılan dayanılmaz soğuk onları tüketiyordu. Güçleri tükenen askerler, parmaklarını gevşetip aşağıya çakıldı. Bedenleri sonsuza dek o karanlık hiçliğe gömüldü.

languages.text: Der Abstieg war lang und beschwerlich. Viele der Soldaten erlagen der eisigen Dunkelheit, die uns in den Eingeweiden dieser Gruftwelt erwartete. Die unerträgliche Kälte, die aus den Mauern dieses Ortes drang, laugte sie aus. Ihrer Stärke beraubt, öffneten sie ihre Finger und stürzten in den Tod. Und so verschlang ewige Vergessenheit ihre Leiber.
languages.original_text: The descent was long and arduous. Many of the soldiers succumbed to the icy darkness they faced in the bowels of this Tomb World. The unbearable cold, emanating from the very walls of the place, sapped them; their strength spent, they unclenched their fingers and plummeted. Dark oblivion claimed their bodies forever.

traits.locale_text: Der Abstieg war lang und beschwerlich. Viele der Soldaten erlagen der eisigen Dunkelheit, die uns in den Eingeweiden dieser Gruftwelt erwartete. Die unerträgliche Kälte, die aus den Mauern dieses Ortes drang, laugte sie aus. Ihrer Stärke beraubt, öffneten sie ihre Finger und stürzten in den Tod. Und so verschlang ewige Vergessenheit ihre Leiber.

languages.text: 長い険しい下降路。異種技術の熱気によって隊員の皮膚は乾燥し裂け、毒の瘴気によって戦闘員たちは指を緩め、無気力に深淵に落下していく。
languages.original_text: The descent was long and arduous. The squad's skin dried out and split under the hot exhalations of the xenotech, and the poisonous miasmas made the fighters unclench their fingers and plummet, lifeless, into the chasm below.
